_comment: Canonical vocabulary — the single source of concept/skill IDs + the 9 axes. Hand-curated CANON (committed, NOT gitignored; contains no personal study data). capture.mjs READS this to normalize a rep's concept (case-fold + alias lookup) and to flag unregistered:true; capture NEVER writes it (single-writer preserved). track:"concept" IDs = AI concepts (9-axis, decay-prone); track:"skill" IDs = Python (fluency, NO axis). Grows over time; adding an entry retro-registers matching reps on next load.
